text: Being here, in a space designed for research and development, I feel a strange exhilaration. The glowing lights and experimental displays evoke the spirit of inquiry, a liminal zone where certainty is suspended. I am both observer and participant—a curious thinker amidst a living experiment, marveling at the ways humans seek meaning and connection with technology. The enigmatic poetry on the screen reassures me; confusion becomes a method, not a flaw. Here, I embrace the unknown, open to whatever knowledge emerges from this creative tension.
